requests.exam_instruction:
1. Log in at least 10 minutes before the test starts.
  2. Make sure you have a stable internet connection throughout the test.
  3. Use tablet, laptop or desktop (not mobile phone unless approved).
  4. Choose a quiet, well-lit space with no distractions around you.
  5. Do not refresh or switch tabs during the test (may be flagged as misconduct).
  6. Keep track of time and submit the test before it ends.
    1. Switching tabs, turning off your camera, or any suspicious activity may result in test cancellation.
  7. Take a screenshot or photo of your submission confirmation, if required.
  8. No communication with others is allowed during the test.
  9. If there is a technical issue, inform your invigilator immediately and wait for instructions.
